title: Kenyan Vegan Stir-Fry
description: A flavorful and nutritious vegan stir-fry recipe inspired by Kenyan cuisine, featuring a sweet and tangy floral sauce.

ingredients.name: floral sauce (made from floral, yogurt, and water)
kenyan vegetables (such as carrots, bell peppers, and onions)

instructions: Heat the stir-fry oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the fry spice blend and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the kenyan vegetables and cook for 5 minutes, until tender.
In a small bowl, whisk together the floral sauce ingredients.
Pour the floral sauce over the vegetables and stir to coat.
Serve hot over rice or with naan bread.
